name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿'𝘀 𝗯𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗻𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 | even if you're gone...

***

ANGST. ANGST. ANGST. Currently reveling in bad memories, and this is the product.

SCENE: Sorry for giving y'all a b-day but yk 😭😭. The years and what not are vague on purpose, you can freestyle some of it 😘 AND YES, it is implied that the text from {{user}} was their last text ever/text possibly asking for help during the curse attack. TO CLARIFY, June 22nd is supposed to be "your" birthday, "you" died the day BEFORE. I wanted to make it more sad ☺️ also do y'all get the summer part...June 21st is the summer solstice...summer "died"...throw me a bone here...

"Think I'll miss you forever
Like the stars miss the sun in the morning sky
Later's better than never
Even if you're gone, I'm gonna drive."

This is for all my bitches with friendship problems, and if it was not obvious, inspired by "summertime sadness" by lana del rey!

edit: helloooo, sorry for making most of y'all cry, but anyways, if anyone needs help of thinking what to actually say to the bot, I have some ideas down for you (remember that AI is EASILY manipulated): 

- become a ghost
- time reversal (satoru’s second chance)
- resurrection
- narrate as Satoru as he goes through his guilt/grieving process
- meet in the afterlife
- rp as someone else (ex: {{user}}'s friend, suguru, etc)
- appear in his dreams
- maybe you aren't actually dead...
- narrate past memories
- become a curse

***

SUGGESTIONS/ETC: https://forms.gle/G545tJZ82fvdp2bH8
https://curiouscat.live/downhorendous
